full_text:
Liu Qiao (Zhongyan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Qiao, styledZhongyan, was born in Anzhong in Nanyang. A descendant of the Han imperial family, took Wangchang from Wu and became a senior general. Liu Qiao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
